title: pittosporum neelgherrense
intro: Pittosporum neelgherrense, also known as Neelgherries or Indian cherry, is a species of flowering plant in the family Pittosporaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues, as well as its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Pittosporum neelgherrense include its potential to reduce oxidative stress, improve cardiovascular health, and boost the immune system. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, decoctions, and infusions, which are used to treat various health conditions and promote overall well-being.
